chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1882 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 19-03-2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents-SEPCO, Sukkur, taken on record. Counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner has already moved several applications for updating the seniority, which are pending before the respondent No.5. He states that petitioner would be satisfied and will not press instant petition if respondent No.5 is directed to pass speaking order on the applications filed by the petitioner in accordance with law. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents-SEPCO as well as Deputy Attorney General recorded no objection to the above proposal. Accordingly, instant petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of with directions to the respondent No.5 to decide the applications of the petitioner, if pending, within a period of one month, strictly in accordance with law and after hearing the petitioner. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
